navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

actions.label: Open Analysis Surface
actions.meaning: Navigates directly to the Kai analysis workspace and history route.

actions.label: Open Analysis History
actions.meaning: Navigates to analysis page history context.

actions.label: Start Stock Analysis
actions.meaning: Creates fresh analysis intent and opens the debate workspace.

actions.label: Resume Active Analysis Run
actions.meaning: Attaches to currently running debate task and opens focused analysis route.

navigation_prerequisites: active debate run must exist for this user

actions.label: Cancel Active Analysis Run
actions.meaning: Cancels running debate task and returns to history view.

navigation_prerequisites: active debate run must exist for this user

actions.label: Legacy Transcript Tab Route
actions.meaning: Legacy tab token accepted by parser but no transcript tab is rendered in current analysis UI.

navigation_prerequisites: analysis route must be loaded

execution_target.reason: No transcript tab trigger/content exists in app/kai/analysis/page.tsx.

actions.label: Open Marketplace RIA Profile
actions.meaning: Navigates to a public marketplace RIA profile route.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA profile identifier should be known for a full profile view.

actions.label: Request Advisory Access
actions.meaning: Creates an investor-to-RIA advisory consent request for the current marketplace profile.

navigation_prerequisites: Signed-in investor persona must be active.
RIA profile must be loaded.
RIA profile must have a connectable verification status.

execution_target.reason: Creating an investor-to-RIA consent request must stay user-triggered on the marketplace profile.

state_changes: route moves to pending marketplace connections

backend_effects.effect: Creates an investor-to-RIA consent request using investor_advisor_disclosure_v1.

actions.label: Manage RIA Profile
actions.meaning: Navigates an active RIA persona from their public marketplace profile back to profile management.

navigation_prerequisites: Active persona must be RIA.

actions.label: Continue Browsing Marketplace
actions.meaning: Returns from the marketplace RIA profile to the marketplace browsing surface.

actions.label: Open Public Disclosure
actions.meaning: Opens the external public disclosure URL attached to the marketplace RIA profile.

navigation_prerequisites: Profile must expose a public disclosures URL.

execution_target.reason: External disclosure URLs are dynamic profile state and should be opened manually.

actions.label: Open Email
actions.meaning: Navigates to One email request review.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

actions.label: Manage Verified Emails
actions.meaning: Opens the verified email address panel used to match email requests.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Requires opening the local verified email panel in /one/kyc.

actions.label: Sync Email Status
actions.meaning: Refreshes the selected email request status after consent approval.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Requires selected workflow context from /one/kyc.

actions.label: Review Email Draft
actions.meaning: Reads or focuses the current approval-gated email draft.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Requires selected workflow context and user-visible draft state.

actions.label: Request Email Redraft
actions.meaning: Requests a new email draft revision from typed or spoken user instructions.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Requires selected workflow context and captured redraft instructions.

actions.label: Approve Email Send
actions.meaning: Sends the email draft only after explicit user approval.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Voice must not send mail until the selected workflow and explicit confirmation are wired to the same UI approval endpoint.

actions.label: Reject Email Draft
actions.meaning: Rejects the current email draft and blocks the workflow.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

execution_target.reason: Requires selected workflow context from /one/kyc.

actions.label: Open Profile
actions.meaning: Navigates to profile landing route.

actions.label: Open Gmail Connector Panel
actions.meaning: Navigates to hidden Gmail detail panel in Profile > Account.

navigation_prerequisites: profile route must be active
query param panel=gmail

actions.label: Open Support Panel
actions.meaning: Navigates to hidden support panel in Profile > Account.

navigation_prerequisites: profile route must be active
query params tab=account & panel=support

actions.label: Open Vault Security Panel
actions.meaning: Navigates to hidden security panel in Profile > Privacy.

navigation_prerequisites: profile route must be active
query params tab=privacy & panel=security

actions.label: Open PKM Agent Lab
actions.meaning: Navigates to the PKM Agent Lab privacy workspace.

navigation_prerequisites: localhost developer access to PKM Agent Lab must be enabled

actions.label: Submit Support Message
actions.meaning: Sends support/bug/developer feedback email via support service.

execution_target.reason: submitSupportMessage is local to ProfilePage and not exported to global executor.

actions.label: Toggle Marketplace Visibility
actions.meaning: Opts investor persona in/out of RIA marketplace discoverability.

execution_target.reason: Only handled by local Switch in ProfilePage.

actions.label: Sign Out
actions.meaning: Ends current session and redirects to home route.

execution_target.reason: handleSignOut exists only in ProfilePage and is not bound to voice/global executor.

actions.label: Delete Account
actions.meaning: Deletes investor/ria persona or full account depending on selected target.

navigation_prerequisites: vault unlock may be required before delete confirmation

execution_target.reason: Delete flow is intentionally local + guarded by dialogs and vault unlock.

actions.label: Generate PKM capture preview
actions.meaning: Builds the current PKM Agent Lab capture preview without saving it.

actions.label: Save PKM capture
actions.meaning: Persists the current PKM Agent Lab capture into encrypted PKM storage.

navigation_prerequisites: a saveable PKM capture preview must already exist

actions.label: Open Receipts Page
actions.meaning: Navigates directly to receipts page from any investor surface.

navigation_prerequisites: navigate to profile surface if route is currently outside profile scope

backend_effects.effect: Reads Gmail connector status on mount.

actions.label: Connect Gmail
actions.meaning: Starts OAuth flow for Gmail receipts connector.

execution_target.reason: Only local component handler exists (handleConnectGmail in ProfilePage).

backend_effects.effect: Generates OAuth authorize URL and state nonce.

actions.label: Sync Gmail Receipts Now
actions.meaning: Queues and polls Gmail receipt sync run.

execution_target.reason: Implemented only in local page handlers; no shared voice/action adapter yet.

actions.label: Build receipts memory preview
actions.meaning: Builds the receipts-to-PKM preview from stored Gmail receipts.

execution_target.reason: Implemented only in local receipts-page handlers; no shared voice/action adapter yet.

backend_effects.effect: Builds or refreshes the receipts memory artifact preview.

actions.label: Save receipts memory to PKM
actions.meaning: Persists the current receipts-memory preview into shopping.receipts_memory.

navigation_prerequisites: receipt memory preview must exist before save

execution_target.reason: Save to PKM is currently implemented only inside the receipts page.

actions.label: Disconnect Gmail
actions.meaning: Disconnects Gmail OAuth credentials for future syncs.

execution_target.reason: No global action dispatcher for Gmail disconnect yet.

actions.label: Open RIA Clients
actions.meaning: Navigates to the RIA client roster route.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA onboarding must be complete.

actions.label: Open Client Workspace
actions.meaning: Represents visible client row buttons. Choosing a specific dynamic client remains manual until voice carries a selected client id.

navigation_prerequisites: A connected client row must be selected.

execution_target.reason: Client workspace routes require a dynamic investor user id from the clicked row.

actions.label: Open RIA Connect Marketplace
actions.meaning: Navigates from the RIA shell to the marketplace connection surface.

actions.label: Open RIA Onboarding
actions.meaning: Navigates to the professional onboarding route for advisor verification.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA workspace must be available or in setup for this account.

workflow.blocked_guidance: Sign in and unlock RIA setup before starting advisor onboarding.

actions.label: Verify Advisor Name
actions.meaning: Represents the advisor-name verification button. The actual verification call stays manual because it uses the current form value.

navigation_prerequisites: Advisor display name must be entered.
No verification request may already be running.

execution_target.reason: Advisor name verification depends on current form state and must be triggered from the visible onboarding control.

actions.label: Submit RIA Verification
aliases: send my advisor profile for review
actions.meaning: Represents the final onboarding submission. Voice can explain it, but the user must submit from the review screen.

navigation_prerequisites: Current onboarding step must be review.
Required onboarding fields must pass the local flow guard.
Advisor name verification must be satisfied for live submission.

execution_target.reason: RIA verification submission changes persona/profile state and must remain user-triggered on the review screen.

state_exposure: public profile headline and strategy summary

actions.label: Bypass RIA Verification In Dev
actions.meaning: Represents the development or UAT-only RIA activation bypass. It is always manual-only for voice.

navigation_prerequisites: Development RIA bypass must be allowlisted.
Advisor display name must be entered.

execution_target.reason: Development-only RIA activation must be clicked intentionally in the onboarding UI.

actions.label: Open RIA Home
actions.meaning: Navigates to the RIA workspace home route.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA workspace must be available for this account.

workflow.blocked_guidance: Complete or unlock RIA setup before entering the RIA workspace.

actions.label: Open Priority Queue Item
actions.meaning: Represents the visible priority queue Open buttons on RIA home. Dynamic queue URLs still require the on-screen control.

navigation_prerequisites: A priority queue item with an href must be visible.

execution_target.reason: Priority queue item URLs are dynamic screen state and are not safe to execute from the static gateway yet.

actions.label: Open RIA Picks
actions.meaning: Navigates to the RIA stock universe and advisor package route.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA onboarding must be complete.

actions.label: Show Kai Picks Source
actions.meaning: Switches the picks route state to Kai's read-only reference list.

actions.label: Show My Advisor Picks
actions.meaning: Switches the picks route state to the advisor's own package.

actions.label: Show Top Picks
actions.meaning: Switches the picks route state to top picks.

actions.label: Show Avoid List
actions.meaning: Switches the picks route state to avoid rows.

actions.label: Show Screening Rules
actions.meaning: Switches the picks route state to screening rules.

actions.label: Edit Advisor Package
actions.meaning: Represents opening the editable advisor package draft. Voice can explain it, but editing stays manual.

navigation_prerequisites: My list source must be selected.
Vault must be unlocked.

execution_target.reason: The advisor package editor mutates local draft state and is not exposed as a voice tool.

actions.label: Save Advisor Package
actions.meaning: Represents saving the advisor package to vault-backed pick storage. Voice cannot complete the save.

navigation_prerequisites: Editor must be open.
Draft must have unsaved changes.
Vault must be unlocked.

execution_target.reason: Saving advisor picks writes vault-backed PKM and API state and must stay user-triggered.

actions.label: Upload Top Picks CSV
actions.meaning: Represents the CSV upload and replace flow. File picking and upload remain manual.

navigation_prerequisites: My list source must be selected.
Upload panel must be open.
A CSV file must be selected.
Vault must be unlocked.

execution_target.reason: CSV file selection and replacement are browser/file-system interactions and must stay manual.

state_exposure: current advisor package avoid and screening context

actions.label: Copy Kai Package Into My List
aliases: use kai list as my list
actions.meaning: Represents copying Kai reference picks into the advisor draft. Voice can explain it, but the copy stays manual.

navigation_prerequisites: My list source must be selected.
Vault must be unlocked.
Kai package rows must be available.

execution_target.reason: Copying the Kai package replaces local advisor draft state and must stay user-triggered.

actions.label: Discard Advisor Package Changes
actions.meaning: Represents discarding unsaved advisor package draft changes. Voice cannot discard for the user.

navigation_prerequisites: Editor must be open.

execution_target.reason: Discarding draft changes must stay user-triggered.

actions.label: Edit Picks Rows Manually
actions.meaning: Covers row-level add, remove, ticker, tier, thesis, avoid reason, and screening rule edits that require hands-on UI entry.

navigation_prerequisites: My list source must be selected.
Editor must be open.
Vault must be unlocked.

execution_target.reason: Row-level editing requires structured manual input inside the picks editor.

actions.label: Download Picks CSV Template
actions.meaning: Navigates to the CSV template used for top-picks uploads.

actions.label: Open RIA Requests
actions.meaning: Routes legacy RIA requests links to the consent center.

navigation_prerequisites: Consent center must be available.

actions.label: Open RIA Settings
actions.meaning: Routes RIA profile management links to the profile settings surface.

navigation_prerequisites: RIA persona must be available before profile settings routing.

actions.label: Open RIA Workspace Compatibility Route
actions.meaning: Routes legacy RIA workspace links to a client workspace when a clientId is present, otherwise to the client roster.

navigation_prerequisites: Optional clientId determines whether the route resolves to a client workspace or the client roster.

actions.label: Open Consent Center
actions.meaning: Navigates to consents route.

actions.label: Go Back
actions.meaning: Navigates back to the previous Kai or profile surface in browser history.

navigation_prerequisites: client browser history must have a previous entry
current route must already be inside a signed-in Kai or profile surface

actions.label: Open Portfolio Dashboard
actions.meaning: Navigates to portfolio dashboard for source/holdings context.

actions.label: Open Portfolio Import
actions.meaning: Navigates to import flow for statement upload / portfolio bootstrap.

actions.label: Open Investments Surface
actions.meaning: Navigates to investments workspace from hidden or non-visible surface.

navigation_prerequisites: user must be signed in

actions.label: Open Optimize Surface
actions.meaning: Navigates to optimize workspace route directly.

navigation_prerequisites: optimization context should be prepared from portfolio source

actions.label: Open Market Home
actions.meaning: Navigates to the Investor Kai market home surface.

actions.label: Open RIA Client Account Detail
actions.meaning: Navigates to the advisor-facing detail route for a selected client account branch.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier and account identifier must be known.
Account branch must be visible to the RIA workspace.

execution_target.reason: Opening a specific account detail requires a dynamic account id selected from the workspace.

actions.label: Return To Client Data Explorer
actions.meaning: Navigates from an unavailable account detail route back to the client workspace explorer tab.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.

actions.label: Open RIA Client Request Detail
actions.meaning: Navigates to the advisor-facing detail route for a selected client access request.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier and request identifier must be known.
Request must be present in the client workspace history.

execution_target.reason: Opening a specific request detail requires a dynamic request id selected from workspace history.

actions.label: Return To Client Access
actions.meaning: Navigates from an unavailable request detail route back to the client workspace access tab.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.

actions.label: Open RIA Client Workspace
actions.meaning: Navigates to a selected client's advisor workspace.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.
RIA onboarding must be complete.

actions.label: Show Client Overview
actions.meaning: Switches the client workspace to the overview tab.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.

actions.label: Show Client Sharing
actions.meaning: Switches the client workspace to the access and sharing tab.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.

actions.label: Show Client Portfolio
actions.meaning: Switches the client workspace to the portfolio tab when approved client portfolio access is ready.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.
Portfolio workspace may be locked until consent approval and summary readiness.

actions.label: Show Client Data Explorer
actions.meaning: Switches the client workspace to the data explorer tab when client data access is ready.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.
Explorer may be locked until consent approval and data readiness.

actions.label: Open Client Account Detail
actions.meaning: Opens a selected account branch detail route from the client workspace.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.
Account branch identifier must be selected.

execution_target.reason: Opening a specific account detail requires the clicked account branch id from visible row state.

actions.label: Open Access Manager
actions.meaning: Navigates to the consent access manager from the client workspace.

navigation_prerequisites: Client identifier must be known.

actions.label: Send Client Access Request
actions.meaning: Creates a consent request bundle for the selected client using the selected template, scopes, accounts, and optional reason.

navigation_prerequisites: Access tab must be open.
A request template must be available.
At least one scope must be selected.
Required account selections must be present.
Test profiles cannot send real requests.

execution_target.reason: Sending an access request uses selected scopes, account ids, and client-visible note state and must remain user-triggered.

backend_effects.effect: Creates a consent request bundle for the selected investor.

actions.label: Disconnect Client Relationship
actions.meaning: Disconnects the current advisor-client relationship and ends access immediately.

navigation_prerequisites: Client detail must be loaded.
Relationship must not be a self relationship.
Test profiles cannot disconnect real relationships.

execution_target.reason: Disconnecting a client relationship is destructive and must remain user-triggered.

backend_effects.effect: Disconnects the investor relationship and ends access.
